renames.rationale: Strings 'invalid map<K, T> key' and 'cannot use at() with ' plus memcmp + _CxxThrowException match std::map::at()-style keyed lookup that throws on missing key.
Only callee is __std_exception_copy and it has 5 callers that look like throw helpers (14001d320/490/4c0, 14001e0d0, 14001f3f0); classic exception-object ctor copying message.
Tiny 33-byte wrapper whose sole callee is the std::exception copy ctor (vb_std_exception_init_copy); paired with 14001d490 and called from 14001e410/14001e2a0 throw sites.
Mirror of 14001d320: 33-byte wrapper, sole callee is std::exception copy ctor, same two callers (14001e410, 14001e2a0); second of paired throw helpers for distinct exception types.
16-instr trampoline calling FUN_14001c7b0 and FUN_14002f180 (likely __security_check_cookie); no strings, no callers — pass1 placeholder marking the bridge to 14001c7b0.
